title: SettingsGroup
description: Read-only registry row for a settings group (a set of related settings surfaced together in the UI). Rows are DISCOVERED at boot from #[AsSetting] attributes on setting-class definitions across every module — not created via HTTP writes. This schema documents the wire shape returned by `GET /api/v1/settings-groups` + used by the SDUI settings navigator. Actual VALUES for individual settings live on `SettingValue` (schemas/setting-value.schema.json), keyed by (workspace_id, group_key, field_name).

x-eloquent.note: VIRTUAL model — not backed by a DB table. Assembled at request time by SettingsRegistry from discovered #[AsSetting] classes. The `SettingsGroupData` DTO is the canonical wire shape.

key.description: Stable slug used in URL routing + the settings table (e.g. `notifications`, `localization_user`, `subscription`).

class.description: Fully qualified class name of the settings definition (e.g. `Academorix\Subscription\Settings\SubscriptionSettings`).

module.description: Slug of the owning module. Derived from the class namespace.

label.description: Display label for the group. Translated via `t()` on the workspace surface — caller may pre-resolve or pass through.

description.description: Short prose describing what the group covers. Rendered under the label.

scope.description: Which entity owns the settings VALUES. workspace = one row per workspace; user = one row per user; application = one row per Application; platform = single global row.

public.description: True = readable by any workspace member; false = admin-only.

sort_order.description: Ascending sort in the settings navigator sidebar.

permission.description: Optional permission gate. Null = no gate (public read for public groups, admin gate implied by non-public).

requires_feature.description: Feature-flag key; group hidden when disabled.

requires_entitlement.description: Entitlement key; sections that carry `requiresEntitlement` hide when the entitlement is exhausted.

sections.description: Ordered sections within the group. Each section groups a set of fields (settings-schema rows) under a subtitle.

x-related.kind: the actual persisted value for a (group, field, scope-owner) tuple
